name: plist.ts-workspace
description: Monorepo for @sapkalabs/plist.ts — a modern ESM TypeScript plist library

scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @sapkalabs/plist.ts typecheck && yarn workspace @sapkalabs/plist.ts-demo typecheck
scripts.clean: yarn workspace @sapkalabs/plist.ts clean && yarn workspace @sapkalabs/plist.ts-demo clean
